case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. MICHAEL LECHADORES

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LECHADORES, MICHAEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LECHADORES, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 66 GEARY STREET, ROOM 309, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, LEASE FORFEITED, ***ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT HAS BEEN CANCELED***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LECHADORES, MICHAEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED MAY-29-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LECHADORES, MICHAEL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LECHADORES, MICHAEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LECHADORES, MICHAEL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LECHADORES, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-21-2025.
